subcodes.title: Words to a Frenchman, spoken on 1913-03-30
subcodes.first_line: Just at this time I was thinking of you. You are most welcomed. Be thou happy for thou hast heard the Call of the Kingdom of Abha.
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @growth of the Cause
